texto: You need something more than just the scientific method to explain the world in which we live. Beware of false dichotomies (either/or situations) that proponents of scientism assume. You should never have to choose whether or not you believe in either a plane’s engine or gravity. You can have both. You shouldn’t have to accept the existence of Steve Jobs or the iPhone
autor: nor should you have to decide whether you believe in God or science. Those who insist that scientific discoveries disprove God are mistaken.
explicacao: Orientação direta de nor should you have to decide whether you believe in God or science. Those who insist that scientific discoveries disprove God are mistaken. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You need something more than just the scientific method to explain the world in which we live. Be…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, jon-morrison, either, útil em momentos de reflexao.
